title: Do official english dubtitles exist in any release
display_title: Do official english dubtitles exist in any release
wikitext:
[]: Do official english dubtitles exist in any release?             Quote Post by CSManiac33 » Mon May 24, 2021 10:10 pm This is just a curiosity and I can't find anything about it. thanks

[]: Re: Do official english dubtitles exist in any release?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue May 25, 2021 3:56 am No. But a user is making some .

[]: Re: Do official english dubtitles exist in any release?             Quote Post by AWinters » Thu Jul 08, 2021 11:45 pm CSManiac33 wrote: This is just a curiosity and I can't find anything about it. thanks

[]: Re: Do official english dubtitles exist in any release?             Quote Post by GlassReality45 » Tue Aug 17, 2021 2:34 pm I think Amazon has some for the new dub of the New Theatrical Editions, if it helps any. Though I don't know about the original series.

[]: Re: Do official english dubtitles exist in any release?             Quote Post by AWinters » Tue Sep 14, 2021 6:15 pm My dialogue captions are finished, but I'm still adding labels and looking for a platform for them (when I get that far).

[]: Re: Do official english dubtitles exist in any release?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Sep 20, 2021 11:05 am GKIDS usually had subtitles for both the Japanese and the English dubs. This is carrying over to all of their Blu-ray releases of NGE. tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))
